title: Reverse-image search (optional)
why: Photos can connect a former identity to a current one even when the names don't match. This step links out to image-search tools — Errata never uploads anything for you.
instructions: Pick a photo of yourself that's publicly online (an old profile picture, for example).
Use a reverse-image-search tool to see where else that image appears.
If an image surfaces under your former name, add it to your ledger.
deadnamePrompts: Heads-up: image-search tools are third parties. Anything you upload goes to them, not through Errata — only use a photo you're comfortable sharing with that tool.
